config:
Inspect or update Agent Soul-backed config assets through the Agent Stub.

Usage:
  dify-agent config [command]

Available Commands:
  env         Update config env variables visible to the current run.
  files       Pull or update config files through the Agent Stub.
  manifest    Show the current visible Agent config manifest as JSON.
  note        Pull or update the current config note.
  skills      Pull or update config skills through the Agent Stub.

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for config

Use "dify-agent config [command] --help" for more information about a command.
config env:
Update config env variables visible to the current run.

Usage:
  dify-agent config env [command]

Available Commands:
  push        Set or delete config env entries from one local dotenv file or stdin.

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for env

Use "dify-agent config env [command] --help" for more information about a command.
config env push:
Set or delete config env entries from one local dotenv file or stdin.

Usage:
  dify-agent config env push PATH|- [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for push
config files:
Pull or update config files through the Agent Stub.

Usage:
  dify-agent config files [command]

Available Commands:
  delete      Delete one or more config files by name without touching local files.
  pull        Pull one or all visible config files into ./.dify_conf/files by default.
  push        Upload one or more local files into the current config manifest.

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for files

Use "dify-agent config files [command] --help" for more information about a command.
config files delete:
Delete one or more config files by name without touching local files.

Usage:
  dify-agent config files delete NAME... [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for delete
config files pull:
Pull one or all visible config files into ./.dify_conf/files by default.

Usage:
  dify-agent config files pull [NAME]... [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help        help for pull
      --json        Emit the pull result as JSON.
      --to string   Local directory for pulled config files.
config files push:
Upload one or more local files into the current config manifest.

Usage:
  dify-agent config files push PATH... [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for push
config manifest:
Show the current visible Agent config manifest as JSON.

Usage:
  dify-agent config manifest [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for manifest
config note:
Pull or update the current config note.

Usage:
  dify-agent config note [command]

Available Commands:
  pull        Export the current config note into ./.dify_conf/note.md by default.
  push        Replace the current config note from one local text file or stdin.

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for note

Use "dify-agent config note [command] --help" for more information about a command.
config note pull:
Export the current config note into ./.dify_conf/note.md by default.

Usage:
  dify-agent config note pull [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help        help for pull
      --to string   Local markdown file path.
config note push:
Replace the current config note from one local text file or stdin.

Usage:
  dify-agent config note push [PATH|-] [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for push
config skills:
Pull or update config skills through the Agent Stub.

Usage:
  dify-agent config skills [command]

Available Commands:
  delete      Delete one or more config skills by name without touching local directories.
  pull        Pull one or all visible config skills into ./.dify_conf/skills by default.
  push        Upload one or more local skill directories into the current config manifest.

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for skills

Use "dify-agent config skills [command] --help" for more information about a command.
config skills delete:
Delete one or more config skills by name without touching local directories.

Usage:
  dify-agent config skills delete NAME... [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for delete
config skills pull:
Pull one or all visible config skills into ./.dify_conf/skills by default.

Usage:
  dify-agent config skills pull [NAME]... [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help        help for pull
      --json        Emit the pull result as JSON.
      --to string   Local directory for pulled config skills.
config skills push:
Upload one or more local skill directories into the current config manifest.

Usage:
  dify-agent config skills push PATH... [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for push
connect:
Establish one Agent Stub connection using the current environment.

Usage:
  dify-agent connect [ARGV]... [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for connect
      --json   Emit the connection response as JSON.
drive:
List, pull, or push agent drive files through the Agent Stub.

Usage:
  dify-agent drive [command]

Available Commands:
  list        List drive files visible to the current sandbox execution.
  pull        Pull one or more drive keys/prefixes into one local directory tree.
  push        Upload one local file or directory into the agent drive.

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for drive

Use "dify-agent drive [command] --help" for more information about a command.
drive list:
List drive files visible to the current sandbox execution.

Usage:
  dify-agent drive list [REMOTE_PREFIX] [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for list
      --json   Emit the drive manifest as JSON.
drive pull:
Pull one or more drive keys/prefixes into one local directory tree.

Usage:
  dify-agent drive pull [REMOTE]... [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help        help for pull
      --json        Emit the pull result as JSON.
      --to string   Local base directory for pulled drive files.
drive push:
Upload one local file or directory into the agent drive.

Usage:
  dify-agent drive push LOCAL_PATH REMOTE_PATH [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help          help for push
      --json          Accepted for consistency; drive push output is already emitted as JSON.
      --kind string   Directory upload kind: skill or dir.
file:
Upload or download workflow files through the Agent Stub.

Usage:
  dify-agent file [command]

Available Commands:
  download    Download one workflow file mapping into the local sandbox directory.
  upload      Upload one sandbox-local file as a ToolFile output reference.

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for file

Use "dify-agent file [command] --help" for more information about a command.
file download:
Download one workflow file mapping into the local sandbox directory.

Usage:
  dify-agent file download TRANSFER_METHOD REFERENCE_OR_URL [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help        help for download
      --to string   Local directory for the downloaded file.
file upload:
Upload one sandbox-local file as a ToolFile output reference.

Usage:
  dify-agent file upload PATH [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for upload
